_meta.purpose: Source-hunt plan for 10 webtoon persona slots (id 10-19) in voice_corpus_registry.json. Each persona needs ~30min Korean voice at ≥16kHz with transcript. py ban enforced — ingestion path is curl/yt-dlp/rclone only, no Python libs.

per_clip_steps: [transcript] faster-whisper ... (py ban — use https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=<id>'s auto-captions via yt-dlp --write-auto-subs --skip-download; konvert .vtt → .txt with awk/sed)
constraints: All tools pre-installed on Mac or available via brew — NO pip/python scripts
Transcript extraction: prefer yt-dlp auto-subs over whisper (py dep) — if auto-subs missing, defer that clip
License check: only use videos marked Creative Commons or fair-use educational excerpts ≤3min per source; prefer official channel re-uploads

slot_plans.name: ice_queen
slot_plans.fallback_tts: Naver Clova Voice 'ara' (cold female) — requires API key
slot_plans.notes: avoid screaming/crying clips — need neutral-cold baseline; 15x 2min clips preferred over 1x 30min

slot_plans.name: chaebol_heir
candidate_channels: 공식 드라마 채널 (tvN 상속자들/더 킹 류)
slot_plans.notes: voice actor performances ideal — fewer environmental artifacts than drama clips

slot_plans.name: pure_heroine
slot_plans.notes: prioritize 밝은-순한 tone; avoid sad-crying takes

slot_plans.name: tsundere_oppa
slot_plans.fallback_tts: 없음 — 츤데레는 감정 전환이 핵심, TTS 불가
slot_plans.notes: 2-tone samples critical — need both 까칠 and 다정 takes; split 15min/15min

slot_plans.name: airhead_friend
slot_plans.notes: 변화 많은 억양이 필수 — flat TTS는 부적합; 예능 클립 우선

slot_plans.name: thug_returnee
candidate_channels: 조폭 코미디 영화 공식 클립 (두사부일체/달마야 류)
slot_plans.fallback_tts: 없음 — raspy 양아치 톤은 TTS 재현 불가
slot_plans.notes: satoori(사투리) 섞여도 OK — 캐릭터 특성; 욕설/폭력 장면 제외

slot_plans.name: cold_heiress
slot_plans.notes: id 10 (ice_queen)과 구분 — ice_queen은 학생의 날카로움, cold_heiress는 성인의 우아함

slot_plans.name: gentle_oppa
slot_plans.notes: 강한 저음보다 중음 + 부드러운 smile-voice; id 11 chaebol과 대칭쌍

slot_plans.name: fallen_antagonist
slot_plans.fallback_tts: 없음 — 음울·whispered 톤은 TTS 재현 불가
slot_plans.notes: psychological complexity — 다양한 감정 샘플 필요 (quiet rage, resignation, cold humor)

fallback_strategy.tier2: Public domain K-drama clips (educational fair-use excerpts ≤3min)
fallback_strategy.tier3: User-recorded samples (user records 30min reading ChatML prompts in each archetype)
fallback_strategy.tier4_blocked: Naver Clova / Google TTS — requires .py SDKs, currently .py ban. If user authorizes exception OR hexa-native HTTP client to REST endpoints, can unlock tier4

next_actions: User review this plan — approve/reject source channels
Execute tier1 harvest for top-3 archetypes (id 10/12/15 — distinct voice targets) as pilot
Validate vocoder conditioning quality on pilot before scaling to all 10
If tier1 yields <20min/archetype, fall back to tier3 (user recording) or revisit tier4 (unlock hexa-native HTTP TTS client)
blockers: User review of channel candidates — some K-drama channels enforce copyright claims on downloads
No hexa-native HTTP client yet (blocks tier4 TTS REST calls if needed)
Transcript quality — auto-subs often mis-transcribe voice-acted lines; may need manual correction pass
